creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Thanks. 

Also <https://cgit.freebsd.org/doc/commit/?id=40b6db4afe1f149f24cfad6b60d9b141c59cbb05>, with <https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-doc/commit/40b6db4afe1f149f24cfad6b60d9b141c59cbb05?diff=split#diff-3e0a61c4d601cff7d12aba9db67ac44f25d376970203dbe62628295b76f0409f> focusing on the revision to SA-22:14.

Re: comment #25, comment #26, and (releng/12.4) comment #29: builds of 12.4-RELEASE began yesterday. <https://www.freebsd.org/releases/12.4R/>
